creator: mwm@mired.org
text:
Messages that use MIME (either for encoding, attachments, or
	formatting) don't make it through the digestifier.

Fix: 

Needs to happen on the server; I don't know what mail
	digistifier is being used, but it needs to forward the MIME
	headers for such messages.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Subscribe to, say questions-digest for a while, and watch for
	mesages in the above three categories.
